scripts.ci:verify: npm run test && npm run check:tenant:failopen && npm run check:tenant:sql
scripts.ci:strict: npm run test && rg -n "fallbackCompanyId\s*=\s*1|activeCompanyId\s*=\s*1|return\s+fallbackCompanyId" src/ && rg -n 'SELECT .* FROM (customers|bookings|contacts|staff|settings|otp_cache|booking_actions|media_assets)\b(?!.*company_id)' src/
scripts.ci: npm run ci:structure && npm run ci:tenant && npm run validate:website-template && npm run test
